steps.text: Captain, we're tracking an unidentified hum in the {pick:aft|forward|lower} section. Investigating.
Update on the hum: it's getting {pick:louder|harmonized|rhythmic}. Marvin claims it's the ship being sad. We doubt it.
Mystery solved. The hum was {pick:a resonating snack wrapper|the improbability drive humming show tunes|a very small stowaway band}. Removed, applauded, and logged. Engineering out.
